_file_note: Example only — not loaded by the server. Copy fields into data/universities.json after review. Remove _file_note before merging.
name: Stanford University
summary: Stanford is a highly selective private research university on a quarter system with holistic review. Academic excellence, intellectual vitality, and impact beyond the classroom matter; readers look for depth, initiative, and fit with Stanford’s open, entrepreneurial culture. VERIFY acceptance rate and testing policy on admission.stanford.edu before production use.
culture_notes: Holistic review: no single factor decides admission; context for achievement is expected.
Intellectual vitality and genuine curiosity—especially in essays and teacher signals—carry heavy weight.
Extracurricular depth (sustained commitment, scope, outcomes) preferred over long undifferentiated lists.
Stanford’s Bay Area / entrepreneurial context rewards initiative and real-world problem framing when authentic.
REVIEWER: Confirm current standardized testing policy annually (test-optional policies evolve).

standardized_testing.reviewer_note: VERIFY on admission.stanford.edu for the application cycle; treat policy enum as draft until confirmed.

school_priorities.reader_looks_for: Evidence you pursue ideas for their own sake—through coursework, research, projects, or reading—not only for trophies. Specificity beats generic ‘passion.’
Leadership or depth with scope: people affected, time invested, outcomes, failure, and what changed. Vague titles without mechanism read thin.
Rigor your school offers, grades in context, and any constraints (access, health, work) explained plainly—honesty builds trust.
Why Stanford and this applicant—not interchangeable prestige prose. Personal, reflective, and specific.
How you work with others, learn from peers, or contribute beyond self—without service clichés.

institutional_tone: Optimistic, rigorous, and humane: reward genuine curiosity and real problems solved. Skeptical of prestige cosplay and résumé stuffing; impressed by clarity, self-awareness, and evidence. Bay Area energy favors builders and learners who name tradeoffs.
anti_patterns: Prestige stacking (awards and names) without intellectual substance or story.
Essays that could swap ‘Stanford’ for any top-10 school with no loss of meaning.
Service narratives with no named problem, action, or outcome.
Achievement lists with no reflection, doubt, or change over time.
Treating test scores or GPA as the whole story—context and vitality matter.
